summary: Made two surgical continuity edits: the chapter opening now ties more directly to the prior chapter's packed silence around the landing voice, and the closing beat now points cleanly into Tovin forcing the group toward food and shelter in the next chapter.
edits: Connected the opening silence to the prior chapter by noting nobody named the landing voice while packing the barge or riding inland.
Added a final bridge sentence indicating Tovin will herd them up to the eel house and feed them after securing the yard.
